title: sideritis scordioides var. hirta
intro: Sideritis scordioides var. hirta is a plant species within the genus Sideritis, commonly known as mountain tea or ironwort. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sideritis scordioides var. hirta include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, as well as providing antioxidant protection against oxidative stress and cell damage. Sideritis scordioides var. hirta is often prepared as a herbal tea by infusing the dried leaves in hot water, which can also be used as a base for various herbal preparations, such as tinctures or infusions.
